strategy: Hit Fire or Death, each +35%, and never Life, which she resists 80%; prism if you are Life.
Race Sofia down before her adds pile up. Arkyn, from Round 1 and active on Round 3, spawns a Dread Paladin every Round until slots fill.
Do not bother permanently killing Arkyn. She resummons him in two Rounds, so blade past him onto the boss.
Stack setup fast and land one big Fire or Death hit on Sofia. Kill her cleanly rather than slow-playing, since an early kill mid-summon just spawns another Paladin.
cheatNotes: She summons Arkyn MoonBlade at the end of Round 1, and he starts acting on Round 3.
Kill Arkyn and she resummons him two Rounds later, so he is a recurring problem, not a one-time kill.
Arkyn spawns Dread Paladins each Round until the board is full. Killing Sofia before the second Dread Paladin joins spawns a third instead, so focus her down decisively.
